The '''Sith fleet''' was the spacegoing arm of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] military which fought for the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]] in the closing stages of the [[New Sith Wars]].

==Ships==
Typical [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] were [[Dreadnaught cruiser|Sith Dreadnaughts]] and other [[Cruiser/Legends|cruisers]], but [[Sith Destroyer]]s like the flagship [[Nightfall (Sith Destroyer)|''Nightfall'']] were probably even more powerful, and smaller [[corsair battleship]]s also served as attack ships.

Alongside the larger ships, the Sith fleet made use of [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]] like the [[Buzzard (starfighter)|Buzzard]] and [[Interceptor/Legends|Sith interceptor]], troop transports like the [[Interloper]], and other small ships such as the [[T-class long-range personal cruiser/Legends|T-class long-range personal cruiser]].

From their names, it appears that most of these types were unique to the Sith fleet, indicating that they were constructed in [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] under Sith control, probably in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]], where the Brotherhood of Darkness commanded most of their support.

==Organization and tactics==
The fleet was normally commanded by [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Skere Kaan|Kaan]] in person from the ''Nightfall'', but the ranking naval officer was [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Adrianna Nyras]]. Naval personnel appear to have been non-[[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]], but, especially when driven by Kaan's [[Battle meditation/Legends|battle meditation]], the Sith fleet was capable of challenging the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] in combat.

Operations were based around the control of [[Planet/Legends|planets]]. Attacks involved overwhelming the defending Republic forces in orbit and deploying Sith ground troops for surface combat, and defensive tactics were centered on preventing Republic forces from fighting their way through to place their own troops on Sith-controlled worlds.

==Operational history==
It is not known what sort of naval assets Kaan acquired from the feuding warlords who he united into the [[Brotherhood of Darkness/Legends|Brotherhood of Darkness]], or what sort of fleet was available to the Brotherhood in the first years of their campaign—for instance, at the [[Battle of Korriban (New Sith Wars)|Battle of Korriban]] in [[1006 BBY]].

By [[1003 BBY]], however, the Sith fleet was capable of leading the conquest of [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]] to establish a foothold in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], and in [[1002 BBY]], they won the [[First Battle of Ruusan|First]] and [[Second Battle of Ruusan|Second]] Battles of [[Ruusan/Legends|Ruusan]], eliminating the Republic staging base being used to strike back at Kashyyyk.

It was probably at around this time that the Sith fleet was involved in battles at [[Bespin/Legends|Bespin]] and [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] on the Outer Rim, and then at [[Taanab/Legends|Taanab]], near the [[Hapes Cluster|Hapes Star Cluster]]. Kaan was surprised not to be opposed by a fleet led by [[Jedi Lord|Lord]] [[Hoth (Jedi Lord)|Hoth]], the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and [[General/Legends|General]] who was regarded as the Republic's greatest defender: but the Jedi seemed abruptly absent from the war.

The clash at Taanab, located on the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]] in the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]], may have marked the start of the fleet's push into the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core]]. Undeterred by the seeming disappearance of the Jedi, the fleet thrust forward with a campaign in [[Bormea sector/Legends|Bormea sector]], including the conquest of [[Corulag/Legends|Corulag]], [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]] and [[Brentaal IV/Legends|Brentaal IV]], and the wresting of both the Perlemian hyperlane and the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]] from Republic control.

But at this point, Lord Hoth revealed his hand: he had gathered the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] in a military force named the [[Army of Light/Legends|Army of Light]], and they liberated Ruusan, defeating the defending naval squadron using a massive starfighter attack, and forcing Kaan to return to face them.

By [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000 BBY]], and the closing stages of the [[Ruusan campaign]], most of the fleet had been withdrawn to guard Ruusan itself, entrenched in orbit and outnumbering the Jedi fleet in the outer system, in order to prevent them from providing reinforcements to the Army of Light.

During the [[Seventh Battle of Ruusan]], as part of his plot to destroy Kaan and the Brotherhood, [[Darth Bane/Legends|Darth Bane]] ordered Admiral Nyras to break out from her defensive position and attack the Jedi fleet, allowing [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Valenthyne Farfalla]]'s [[Fairwind|gunships]] to fight their way through to the surface with reinforcements.

The Sith were defeated during that battle, with Kaan and his Brotherhood wiped out.
